name: Sicilian Meat Roll (Created for Roanoke Times Contest 199
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, bread crumbs, tomato juice, parsley, oregano, salt, pepper, and garlic in a bowl.
2. Stir in the ground beef until well mixed.
3. Pat the meat on a sheet of foil to form a rectangle measuring 12x10 inches.
4. Arrange ham slices on the meat, leaving a small margin around the edges.
5. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella over the ham.
6. Starting from the short end, carefully roll up the meat, using the foil to lift it as needed.
7. Seal the edges and ends of the roll.
8. Place the roll, seam side down, in a 13x9x2 inch pan.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and place cheese wedges over the top of the roll.
11. Return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes or until the cheese melts.
